question: Who are the politicians who have served as both the head of state and the head of government of Romania at some point in time?
gold: MATCH (n:Politician)<-[r0:hasHeadOfState]-(m0:Country {name: 'Romania'}),(n:Politician)<-[r1:hasHeadOfGovernment]-(m1:Country {name: 'Romania'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name
pred:
MATCH (romania:Country {name: 'Romania'})
MATCH (romania)-[:hasHeadOfState]->(p:Politician)
WITH romania, p
MATCH (romania)-[:hasHeadOfGovernment]->(p)
RETURN DISTINCT p
